---
title: "Charles-Forbes-René Montalembert"
---

## Charles-Forbes-René Montalembert

**Dates:** (1810-1870)

**Maiden name:** de

### Description

historian and prominent Catholic layman

### Letters

- Letter from August 13. [1869]
- Letter from August 6. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
